content.fact_text: Implemented a production-ready telemetry and observability middleware using Pino, providing automated correlation ID management, structured logging, and request performance monitoring.

provenance_data.behaviour: The telemetryMiddleware intercepts every HTTP request, assigns a unique x-correlation-id, and attaches a Pino logger instance to the request object. It automatically logs incoming request details and, upon completion, logs the status code and processing duration to facilitate distributed tracing and observability. It also handles request errors and ensures PII redaction.
interfaces: telemetryMiddleware(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void
provenance_data.utility: Provides essential observability and distributed tracing capabilities to the ecommerce backend, ensuring all requests are traceable, logged consistently, and PII-protected.
